user.title: Add SmartGhar Hub
user.description: Enter the IP address of your SmartGhar Hub on the local network. Tip: open the hub's web UI on your phone — the IP is shown on the System tab.

data.local_token: Local API token (only if you enabled it on the hub)

zeroconf_confirm.title: SmartGhar Hub discovered
zeroconf_confirm.description: Found '{name}' at {host}. Add it to Home Assistant?

error.cannot_connect: Failed to reach the hub. Check that it's on the same network as Home Assistant and that you can ping it.
error.invalid_token: The local token was rejected. Re-copy it from the hub's web UI.

abort.missing_hub_id: The discovered hub didn't include its ID — please update the hub firmware to 2.7.0 or newer.
